property_issue_summary: The property exhibits multiple issues of dampness across various areas, particularly at skirting levels and ceilings. Additionally, hollowness in tiles and cracks in the walls have been observed. High severity is noted in areas with moisture related problems.

observations.description: Dampness observed at the skirting level of the Hall. This persistent moisture may lead to further issues if not addressed.
observations.recommended_action: Investigate the source of dampness and address it promptly.

observations.description: Hollowness observed in the tiles of the Common Bathroom, indicating possible improper installation or underlying issues.
observations.recommended_action: Inspect the tiles and consider repairs or replacements as necessary.

observations.description: Mild dampness observed at the ceiling of the Common Bathroom, which might indicate water ingress or plumbing issues.

severity.reason: Medium severity due to damp conditions.

observations.recommended_action: Investigate potential leaks or drainage issues.

observations.description: Gaps between tile joints in the Common Bathroom observed, which could lead to water penetration over time.

severity.reason: Minor issue compared to others but requires sealing.

observations.recommended_action: Seal the gaps to prevent moisture ingress.

observations.description: Dampness noted at the skirting level in the Bedroom. This condition may lead to mold growth and damage if not remedied.

severity.reason: Consistent reports of dampness underline the issue.

observations.recommended_action: Check for possible sources of moisture and repair as needed.

observations.description: Dampness at skirting level and cracked external walls noted, indicating potential structural issues.

severity.reason: Medium severity due to moisture and structural concerns.

observations.recommended_action: Address dampness and inspect cracks for potential repairs.

observations.description: Dampness has been noted at the skirting level of the Kitchen, which can pose a risk of mold growth and structural damage.

severity.reason: Critical observation of moisture in a frequently used area.

observations.recommended_action: Investigate moisture source and repair accordingly.

observations.description: Seepage and evident leakage at the ceiling of the Parking area, posing a high risk of structural damage.

severity.reason: High severity due to active water leakage.

observations.recommended_action: Immediate repair of the leakage and assessment of the waterproofing.
